title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Transact Clients Services Ltd
body: "Application number 5467  Applicant Integrated Financial Arrangements Ltd (trading as Transact) objected to the name used by Transact Clients Services Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal. "
